# resend_topic (Resource)

Manages a Resend topic.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_topic" "example" {
  name                 = "Newsletter"
  default_subscription = "opt_in"
  description          = "Monthly newsletter subscribers"
  visibility           = "public"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `default_subscription` (String) opt_in or opt_out. Immutable after creation.
- `name` (String) Topic name. Max 50 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Topic description. Max 200 characters.
- `visibility` (String) public or private.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Topic UUID.
